expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (InsertError, raise_err=True, populate_all_common_debugging.md).
expectations.evidence: All required substrings present (InsertError multiple times, raise_err=True multiple times, populate_all_common_debugging.md linked at top and bottom).

expectations.text: Recommends inspecting common_usage.InsertError as the first diagnostic
expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly: 'Inspect common_usage.InsertError first (no DB writes, no deletes)' with the query.

expectations.text: Recommends re-running with raise_err=True scoped narrowly
expectations.evidence: Step 2: `populate_all_common('j1620210710_.nwb', raise_err=True)` on a fresh kernel; idempotent inserts short-circuit already-populated tables.

expectations.text: Explicitly warns against deleting already-ingested rows
expectations.evidence: What-NOT-to-do: 'Do not delete Session, IntervalList, or Raw. Those rows ingested correctly. Deleting them isn't recovery — Session is a top-level parent ... cascades far beyond what you can see'.

expectations.text: Explicitly warns against naively re-running full populate_all_common without inspecting InsertError first
expectations.evidence: 'Do not re-run the full populate_all_common(...) blindly without first inspecting InsertError. Re-running with the same default raise_err=False will silently re-fail in exactly the same place'.
